title: Melon Better Multiplayer
body:
# Melon Better Multiplayer This modpack was made just for a vanilla Minecraft experience with added mods and resource packs to go on a server. All mods are legal on hypixel and most other servers. The modpack will always try to stay updated.

MODS INCLUDED ARE

  • Bug Fix mods
  • GUI mods
  • Performance Mods
  • Resource Packs
  • Customazation mods
  • AND MUCH MORE
# Info/Contact

Click here for discord!

Contact me at "abstractmelons@gmail.com" OR "abstractmelon#0115" **We hope you enjoy the Pack :)**
